titleStmt.title: SII 22.98: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 98. (A.R. No. 98 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA. TRIBH. KULAŚĒKHARA (MĀR. KULAŚĒKHARA I)—33rd YEAR (A.D. 1300-1)

summary.p: This registers the alienation of 900 kuḻi of dry land at Maṉanduyyaperumāḷnallūr which was a tax-free dēvadāna of the temple of Tāntōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndraśōḻapuram in Vāṇagoppāḍi-nāḍu on the northern bank of the Peṇṇai in favour of a Brāhmaṇa of Maṇalūr by name Tirukkoṭṭi-Āḻvāṉ Periyāṉ Īśurabaṭṭaṉ for his services on the days of festival in the temple. It is stated that the sthānikas received from him 31 paṇam in lumpsum for the payment of kaḍamai on the land levied by the nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti ci kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 33vatu peṇ
ṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭi nāṭṭil caṇpaiyāṉa virarācentira coḻa purattu Uṭaiyār
tiruttāntoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili maṉantuyyap perumāḷ nal
lūr puṉceynilam Āṟṟaṅkaraiyil kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāka maṇalūr pirāmaṇaril
tirukkoṭṭiāḻvāṉ periyaāṉ Īcurapaṭṭaṟkku vilaiyāka viṟṟa maṇalūr kaṭuntuḷikku meṟ
kku peṇṇaiāṟṟukku vaṭakku maṇalūr Āṟṟukkālukku teṟkku Aḷantu viṭṭa
kuḻi toḷāyiramum tirunāḷ tiruppaṇik kuṟaikku vāṅki Iṭṭa paṇam muppattu Oṉṟu
kkum cantirātittavaraiyum kāṇiyāka nāṭupaṇitta kaṭamai Iṟukkavum Ippaṭikkā
ṇiyāka kuṭuttom Ikkoyil tāṉattārom śrīmāheśrarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
